episodes.name: All Episodes Combined
episodes.overview: Fresher Devika Kumari leaks a video during a sex-ed night at Matilda House, sparking controversy. Principal Datta advocates open dialogue but faces pressure to rusticate Paro Sarna. First-years Wallika, Devika, Tabassum, Vandana, and Trisha are caught in the chaotic excitement of their first semester as Matilda House faces a crisis it might not survive.
